title: alsophila insulana
intro: Alsophila insulana, also known as the Kermadec tree fern, is a species of tree fern that belongs to the Alsophila genus. It is native to the Kermadec Islands, a subantarctic island group northeast of New Zealand. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and pain due to its high content of saponins and flavonoids. Alsophila insulana can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas and extracts, which are said to provide health benefits like antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects.
